description: Autograph order in the hand of Avraham Maimonides, r. 1205–1237 CE. Mostly in Arabic script with a few words in Hebrew. Abū Isḥāq Ibrāhīm is to give Eliyyahu the Judge 5 of something (dirhams?). Very similar to the order in T-S K25.240. Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-13. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
